---
title: "beta-spectral-indices"
format: html
editor: visual
---

### Loading Acoustic Data

```{r}
library(seewave)
library(tuneR)
library(dplyr)

# Define base paths for each habitat type
forest_base <- "/Volumes/1 Backup/Soundscapes_Summer25_AS/Acoustic_Indices/WAV_Chunks/Macro_Forest"
barren_base <- "/Volumes/1 Backup/Soundscapes_Summer25_AS/Acoustic_Indices/WAV_Chunks/Urchin_Barren"

# Define sites with their habitat type and subfolder
site_info <- data.frame(
  site = c("Battery_Island", "Crow_Island", "Middle_Island",
           "Harris_Island", "Samsing_Cove", "Sandy_Cove"),
  habitat = c("Macro_Forest", "Macro_Forest", "Macro_Forest",
              "Urchin_Barren", "Urchin_Barren", "Urchin_Barren"),
  subfolder = c("HydroMoth_0",   # Battery_Island
                "HydroMoth_0.5", # Crow_Island 
                "HydroMoth_2",   # Middle_Island 
                "HydroMoth_12",    # Harris_Island 
                "HydroMoth_6",    # Samsing_Cove 
                "HydroMoth_15"),   # Sandy_Cove 
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Build full paths automatically
site_info <- site_info %>%
  mutate(
    base = ifelse(habitat == "Macro_Forest", forest_base, barren_base),
    full_path = file.path(base, site, subfolder)
  )

# Check all paths exist before running
site_info$path_exists <- sapply(site_info$full_path, dir.exists)
print(site_info[, c("site", "habitat", "full_path", "path_exists")])
```

### Temporal Entropy

```{r}
calc_site_ht <- function(site_name, base_dir, n_sample = NULL) {
  
  # Get all wav files for this site
  site_path <- file.path(base_dir, site_name)
  files <- list.files(site_path, pattern = "\\.wav$", 
                      full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
  

  # Calculate Ht for each file
  ht_values <- sapply(files, function(f) {
    tryCatch({
      wav <- readWave(f)
      envelope <- env(wav, f = wav@samp.rate, plot = FALSE)
      th(envelope)
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("  Error on:", basename(f), "\n")
      return(NA)
    })
  }, USE.NAMES = FALSE)
  
  # Return summary
  data.frame(
    site = site_name,
    n_files = length(files),
    n_success = sum(!is.na(ht_values)),
    Ht_mean = mean(ht_values, na.rm = TRUE),
    Ht_sd = sd(ht_values, na.rm = TRUE),
    Ht_median = median(ht_values, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}
```

```{r}
library(readr)
# Core function — stratified by hour, 10 files per hour
calc_ht_stratified <- function(site_name, full_path, files_per_hour = 10) {
  
  cat("\n=============================\n")
  cat("Processing:", site_name, "\n")
  cat("Path:", full_path, "\n")
  
  # Get all wav files
  files <- list.files(full_path, pattern = "\\.wav$", 
                      full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  if (length(files) == 0) {
    cat("  WARNING: No wav files found!\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  cat("  Total files found:", length(files), "\n")
  
  # Extract hour from filename (format: YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS)
  hours <- as.integer(substr(gsub(".*_(\\d{6})_.*", "\\1", 
                                   basename(files)), 1, 2))
  
  file_df <- data.frame(path = files, hour = hours)
  
  # Sample 10 files per hour
  sampled <- file_df %>%
    group_by(hour) %>%
    slice_sample(n = files_per_hour) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  cat("  Sampled files:", nrow(sampled), 
      "across", n_distinct(sampled$hour), "hours\n")
  
  # Calculate Ht for each sampled file
  results <- lapply(1:nrow(sampled), function(i) {
    f <- sampled$path[i]
    tryCatch({
      wav <- readWave(f)
      envelope <- env(wav, f = wav@samp.rate, plot = FALSE)
      ht <- th(envelope)
      data.frame(site = site_name, hour = sampled$hour[i],
                 file = basename(f), Ht = ht)
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("  Error:", basename(f), "-", e$message, "\n")
      data.frame(site = site_name, hour = sampled$hour[i],
                 file = basename(f), Ht = NA)
    })
  })
  
  bind_rows(results)
}

# Run all 6 sites, saving after each one
all_results <- list()

for (i in 1:nrow(site_info)) {
  site_results <- calc_ht_stratified(
    site_name = site_info$site[i],
    full_path = site_info$full_path[i],
    files_per_hour = 10
  )
  
  all_results[[site_info$site[i]]] <- site_results
  
  # Save after each site in case of crashes
  write_csv(bind_rows(all_results), "Ht_results_progress.csv")
  cat("  Saved progress for", site_info$site[i], "\n")
}

# Final summary per site
summary_results <- bind_rows(all_results) %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  summarise(
    n_files   = n(),
    Ht_mean   = mean(Ht, na.rm = TRUE),
    Ht_sd     = sd(Ht, na.rm = TRUE),
    Ht_median = median(Ht, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

print(summary_results)
write_csv(summary_results, "Ht_summary_by_site.csv")
write_csv(bind_rows(all_results), "Ht_all_files.csv")
```

```{r}
# Check what's in it
class(all_results)

# Force convert to data frame
all_results <- do.call(rbind, all_results)

# Verify
class(all_results)
nrow(all_results)
head(all_results)
# Add habitat column
all_results <- all_results %>%
  mutate(habitat = case_when(
    site %in% c("Battery_Island", "Crow_Island", "Middle_Island") ~ "Macro_Forest",
    site %in% c("Harris_Island", "Samsing_Cove", "Sandy_Cove")   ~ "Urchin_Barren"
  ))

# Save the clean combined file
write.csv(all_results, "~/soundscapes_data/Ht_all_sites.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
i <- 6  # Sandy_Cove

site_result <- calc_ht_stratified(
  site_name = site_info$site[i],
  full_path = site_info$full_path[i],
  files_per_hour = 10
)

# Save Sandy Cove results
write.csv(site_result,
          "~/soundscapes_data/Ht_Sandy_Cove.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nDone! Rows:", nrow(site_result), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Save each site separately
for (s in unique(all_results$site)) {
  site_data <- all_results[all_results$site == s, ]
  write.csv(site_data,
            paste0("Ht_", s, ".csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat("Saved:", s, "-", nrow(site_data), "rows\n")
}
```

```{r}
# Load all sites, Sandy Cove from the correct location
all_results <- do.call(rbind, lapply(sites, function(s) {
  # Use soundscapes_data path for Sandy Cove, working dir for others
  f <- if (s == "Sandy_Cove") {
    "~/soundscapes_data/Ht_Sandy_Cove.csv"
  } else {
    paste0("Ht_", s, ".csv")
  }
  if (file.exists(f)) {
    read.csv(f)
  } else {
    cat("Missing:", f, "\n")
    NULL
  }
}))

# Add habitat
all_results <- all_results %>%
  mutate(habitat = case_when(
    site %in% c("Battery_Island", "Crow_Island", "Middle_Island") ~ "Macro_Forest",
    site %in% c("Harris_Island",  "Samsing_Cove", "Sandy_Cove")  ~ "Urchin_Barren"
  ))

cat("Total rows:", nrow(all_results), "\n")
table(all_results$site)

# Save combined to working directory
write.csv(all_results, "Ht_all_sites.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Also copy correct Sandy Cove to working directory for future use
file.copy("~/soundscapes_data/Ht_Sandy_Cove.csv", "Ht_Sandy_Cove.csv", overwrite = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Extract date and datetime from filename
all_results <- all_results %>%
  mutate(
    date     = as.Date(gsub(".*_(\\d{8})_.*", "\\1", file), format = "%Y%m%d"),
    datetime = as.POSIXct(paste(date, sprintf("%02d:00:00", hour)),
                          format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
  )

# Check dates
cat("Date range:", as.character(min(all_results$date)),
    "to", as.character(max(all_results$date)), "\n")

# Filter to matching time window
all_results <- all_results %>%
  mutate(
    date     = as.Date(gsub(".*_(\\d{8})_.*", "\\1", file), format = "%Y%m%d"),
    datetime = as.POSIXct(paste(date, sprintf("%02d:00:00", hour)),
                          format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = "UTC")
  ) %>%
  filter(datetime >= as.POSIXct("2025-07-23 23:59:43", tz = "UTC"),
         datetime <= as.POSIXct("2025-07-28 23:59:32", tz = "UTC"))

cat("Rows after filtering:", nrow(all_results), "\n")
cat("Date range:", as.character(min(all_results$datetime)),
    "to", as.character(max(all_results$datetime)), "\n")
table(all_results$site)

# Plot
ggplot(all_results, aes(x = datetime, y = Ht, color = site)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ habitat, ncol = 1,
             labeller = as_labeller(c(
               "Macro_Forest"  = "Macro Forest",
               "Urchin_Barren" = "Urchin Barren"
             ))) +
  scale_x_datetime(date_breaks = "12 hours",
                   date_labels = "%b %d\n%H:%M") +
  labs(
    title = "Temporal Entropy (Ht) Over 5 Days",
    x     = "Date and Time (Sitka Local Time)",
    y     = "Temporal Entropy (Ht)",
    color = "Site",
    fill  = "Site"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )
```

### Loading in Kaleidoscope Spectral Measurements

```{r}
# List all CSVs recursively through site subfolders
files <- list.files(
  "/Users/aminashenasa/soundscapes_data/data/acoustic_data/spectral_measurements/",
  pattern = "\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE,
  recursive = TRUE  # <-- this is the key
)

cat("Files found:\n")
print(files)

# Stack them all
all_spectral <- do.call(rbind, lapply(files, read.csv))

cat("Total rows:", nrow(all_spectral), "\n")
cat("Sites:", unique(all_spectral$SITE), "\n")

# Save combined
write.csv(all_spectral,
          "/Users/aminashenasa/soundscapes_data/data/acoustic_data/spectral_measurements_combined.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Parse datetime from the kaleidoscope columns
all_spectral <- all_spectral %>%
  mutate(
    datetime = as.POSIXct(paste(DATE..UTC., TIME..UTC.),
                          format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = "UTC")
  ) %>%
  filter(datetime >= as.POSIXct("2025-07-23 23:59:43", tz = "UTC"),
         datetime <= as.POSIXct("2025-07-28 23:59:32", tz = "UTC"))

cat("Rows after filtering:", nrow(all_spectral), "\n")
cat("Date range:", as.character(min(all_spectral$datetime)),
    "to", as.character(max(all_spectral$datetime)), "\n")
table(all_spectral$SITE)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
# Extract date and datetime
all_spectral <- all_spectral %>%
  mutate(
    date     = as.Date(gsub(".*_(\\d{8})_.*", "\\1", IN.FILE), format = "%Y%m%d"),
    datetime = as.POSIXct(paste(DATE..UTC., TIME..UTC.),
                          format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = "UTC"),
    habitat  = case_when(
      SITE %in% c("Battery_Island", "Crow_Island", "Middle_Island") ~ "Macro Forest",
      SITE %in% c("Harris_Island",  "Samsing_Cove", "Sandy_Cove")  ~ "Urchin Barren"
    )
  )

# Pivot to long format so we can facet by measurement
library(tidyr)

spectral_long <- all_spectral %>%
  select(SITE, habitat, datetime, MEAN, SD, MEDIAN, MODE, 
         Q25, Q75, IQR, SKEW, KURT, SFM, SH) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(MEAN, SD, MEDIAN, MODE, Q25, Q75, 
                        IQR, SKEW, KURT, SFM, SH),
               names_to  = "metric",
               values_to = "value")

metrics <- c("MEAN", "SD", "MEDIAN", "MODE", "Q25", "Q75", 
             "IQR", "SKEW", "KURT", "SFM", "SH")

for (m in metrics) {
  p <- ggplot(all_spectral, aes(x = datetime, y = .data[[m]], color = SITE)) +
    stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 0.8) +
    stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "ribbon",
                 aes(fill = SITE), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
    facet_wrap(~ habitat, ncol = 1) +
    scale_x_datetime(date_breaks = "12 hours",
                     date_labels = "%b %d\n%H:%M") +
    labs(
      title = paste("Spectral Index:", m),
      x     = "Date (UTC)",
      y     = m,
      color = "Site",
      fill  = "Site"
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x    = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      strip.text     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  
  ggsave(paste0("plot_", m, ".png"), p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  cat("Saved:", paste0("plot_", m, ".png"), "\n")
}
```

```{r}
# Add date and hour to spectral data
all_spectral <- all_spectral %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(datetime, tz = "UTC"),
    hour = as.integer(format(datetime, "%H"))
  )

# Subsample 10 per hour per site per date to match Ht sampling
set.seed(123)  # for reproducibility
spectral_sampled <- all_spectral %>%
  group_by(SITE, date, hour) %>%
  slice_sample(n = 10) %>%
  ungroup()

cat("Rows:", nrow(spectral_sampled), "\n")
table(spectral_sampled$SITE)
```

```{r}
# Filter Ht to same time window
ht_hourly <- read.csv("Ht_all_sites.csv") %>%
  rename(SITE = site) %>%
  mutate(
    date     = as.Date(gsub(".*_(\\d{8})_.*", "\\1", file), format = "%Y%m%d"),
    datetime = as.POSIXct(paste(date, sprintf("%02d:00:00", hour)),
                          format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = "UTC")
  ) %>%
  filter(datetime >= as.POSIXct("2025-07-23 23:59:43", tz = "UTC"),
         datetime <= as.POSIXct("2025-07-28 23:59:32", tz = "UTC")) %>%
  group_by(SITE, date, hour) %>%
  summarise(Ht = mean(Ht, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

cat("Ht rows after filtering:", nrow(ht_hourly), "\n")
table(ht_hourly$SITE)

# Rejoin with spectral
combined <- left_join(spectral_sampled, ht_hourly,
                      by = c("SITE", "date", "hour"))

cat("Combined rows:", nrow(combined), "\n")
cat("NAs in Ht:", sum(is.na(combined$Ht)), "\n")
table(combined$SITE)
```

```{r}
# Step 1 — filter spectral to time window first
spectral_filtered <- all_spectral %>%
  filter(datetime >= as.POSIXct("2025-07-23 23:59:43", tz = "UTC"),
         datetime <= as.POSIXct("2025-07-28 23:59:32", tz = "UTC")) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(datetime, tz = "UTC"),
         hour = as.integer(format(datetime, "%H")))

cat("Spectral rows after filter:", nrow(spectral_filtered), "\n")
table(spectral_filtered$SITE)

# Step 2 — subsample 10 per site/date/hour
set.seed(123)
spectral_sampled <- spectral_filtered %>%
  group_by(SITE, date, hour) %>%
  slice_sample(n = 10) %>%
  ungroup()

cat("Sampled rows:", nrow(spectral_sampled), "\n")
table(spectral_sampled$SITE)

# Step 3 — rejoin with filtered Ht
combined <- left_join(spectral_sampled, ht_hourly,
                      by = c("SITE", "date", "hour"))

cat("Combined rows:", nrow(combined), "\n")
cat("NAs in Ht:", sum(is.na(combined$Ht)), "\n")
table(combined$SITE)
```

```{r}
# Load Ht with filenames
ht_files <- read.csv("Ht_all_sites.csv") %>%
  rename(SITE = site) %>%
  mutate(
    datetime = as.POSIXct(paste(
      as.Date(gsub(".*_(\\d{8})_.*", "\\1", file), format = "%Y%m%d"),
      sprintf("%02d:00:00", hour)),
      format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = "UTC")
  ) %>%
  filter(datetime >= as.POSIXct("2025-07-23 23:59:43", tz = "UTC"),
         datetime <= as.POSIXct("2025-07-28 23:59:32", tz = "UTC"))

cat("Ht files in time window:", nrow(ht_files), "\n")
table(ht_files$SITE)

# Check what the filename looks like in Ht vs spectral
head(ht_files$file)
head(all_spectral$IN.FILE)
```

```{r}
# Join spectral to Ht matched files by filename
combined <- inner_join(
  all_spectral,
  ht_files %>% select(SITE, file, Ht, hour) %>% rename(IN.FILE = file),
  by = c("SITE", "IN.FILE")
)

cat("Combined rows:", nrow(combined), "\n")
cat("NAs in Ht:", sum(is.na(combined$Ht)), "\n")
table(combined$SITE)
```

```{r}
# Check site names in each dataset
unique(all_spectral$SITE)
unique(ht_files$SITE)

# Check if Samsing and Sandy are in ht_files
ht_files %>% filter(SITE %in% c("Samsing_Cove", "Sandy_Cove")) %>% 
  select(SITE, file) %>% head()

# Check if they're in all_spectral
all_spectral %>% filter(SITE %in% c("Samsing_Cove", "Sandy_Cove")) %>%
  select(SITE, IN.FILE) %>% head()
```

```{r}
# Extract just the recorder ID and timestamp for matching
ht_files <- ht_files %>%
  mutate(file_key = gsub("_000\\.wav$", "", file))  # remove _000.wav

all_spectral <- all_spectral %>%
  mutate(file_key = gsub("\\.WAV$", "", IN.FILE))    # remove .WAV

# Check they now match
head(ht_files$file_key)
head(all_spectral %>% filter(SITE == "Samsing_Cove") %>% pull(file_key))
```

```{r}
# Compare recorder IDs by site
ht_files %>%
  mutate(recorder = gsub("_.*", "", file)) %>%
  group_by(SITE, recorder) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

all_spectral %>%
  mutate(recorder = gsub("_.*", "", IN.FILE)) %>%
  group_by(SITE, recorder) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")
```

```{r}
# Check actual WAV filenames on disk for Samsing
list.files("/Volumes/1 Backup/Soundscapes_Summer25_AS/Acoustic_Indices/WAV_Chunks/Urchin_Barren/Samsing_Cove/HydroMoth_6/",
           pattern = "\\.wav$") %>% head(6)

# And Sandy
list.files("/Volumes/1 Backup/Soundscapes_Summer25_AS/Acoustic_Indices/WAV_Chunks/Urchin_Barren/Sandy_Cove/HydroMoth_15/",
           pattern = "\\.wav$") %>% head(6)

# Compare to what Ht has for those sites
ht_files %>% filter(SITE == "Samsing_Cove") %>% pull(file) %>% head(6)
ht_files %>% filter(SITE == "Sandy_Cove") %>% pull(file) %>% head(6)
```

```{r}
# For all sites - match on SITE + hour + date
# First fix date and hour extraction for spectral
all_spectral <- all_spectral %>%
  mutate(
    # Extract date from the datetime column we already have
    date = as.Date(datetime, tz = "UTC"),
    hour = as.integer(format(datetime, "%H"))
  )

# Summarise Ht to one value per site/date/hour
ht_hourly <- ht_files %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(gsub(".*_(\\d{8})_.*", "\\1", file), format = "%Y%m%d"),
  ) %>%
  group_by(SITE, date, hour) %>%
  summarise(Ht = mean(Ht, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# For Battery, Crow, Harris, Middle — match by exact filename
# For Samsing, Sandy — match by site/date/hour
combined_exact <- inner_join(
  all_spectral %>% filter(SITE %in% c("Battery_Island", "Crow_Island",
                                       "Harris_Island", "Middle_Island")),
  ht_files %>% select(SITE, file, Ht) %>% rename(IN.FILE = file),
  by = c("SITE", "IN.FILE")
)

combined_hourly <- left_join(
  all_spectral %>% filter(SITE %in% c("Samsing_Cove", "Sandy_Cove")) %>%
    group_by(SITE, date, hour) %>%
    slice_sample(n = 10) %>%
    ungroup(),
  ht_hourly %>% filter(SITE %in% c("Samsing_Cove", "Sandy_Cove")),
  by = c("SITE", "date", "hour")
)

# Combine both
combined <- bind_rows(combined_exact, combined_hourly)

cat("Combined rows:", nrow(combined), "\n")
cat("NAs in Ht:", sum(is.na(combined$Ht)), "\n")
table(combined$SITE)
```
